title: Threat Hunting Report
scenario: Write a threat hunting report that analyzes and provides recommendations for a recent security incident. The report should include a brief summary of the incident, key findings, and suggested actions for remediation. The report should be concise and not exceed 200 words.
constraints: Must include a brief summary of the incident
Must provide suggested actions for remediation

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated report meets all the constraints.
Evaluate the tone of the report to ensure it is clear and concise.
Verify that the information provided is accurate and up-to-date.
